ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  "caliber_range" TEXT /* Caliber range for the product type */,
  "usage" TEXT /* Usage of the product type (e.g., hunting, target shooting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ballistic_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ballistic model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the ballistic model (e.g., G1, G7) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ballistic model */,
  "drag_coefficient" REAL /* Drag coefficient for the ballistic model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company that manufactures the product */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product type */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) for the product */,
  "diameter_in" REAL /* Diameter of the bullet in inches */,
  "weight_gr" INTEGER /* Weight of the bullet in grains */,
  "sectional_density" REAL /* Sectional density of the bullet */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "bc_g1" REAL /* Ballistic coefficient (G1 model) */,
  "bc_g7" REAL /* Ballistic coefficient (G7 model) */,
  "bc_fn" TEXT /* Ballistic coefficient (FN model) */,
  "muzzle_velocity" REAL /* Muzzle velocity of the product */,
  "muzzle_energy" REAL /* Muzzle energy of the product */,
  "trajectory" TEXT /* Trajectory of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_versions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., product manager, engineer, sales) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the product data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in inventory */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date when the stock was last updated */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Storage capacity of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES order_status ("status_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)
